import React from 'react'; const Branches = () => { const branches = [ { name: 'Salon Udani - Yakkala', address: 'Yakkala, Sri Lanka', phone: '+94 70 293 3408', whatsapp: '+94702933408', mapUrl: 'https://maps.google.com', directionsUrl: 'https://maps.google.com' }, { name: 'Salon Udani - Warakapola', address: 'Warakapola, Sri Lanka', phone: '+94 70 293 3408', whatsapp: '+94702933408', mapUrl: 'https://maps.google.com', directionsUrl: 'https://maps.google.com' } ]; return (
Visit Us

Our Two Luxury Branches

Visit us at either of our conveniently located branches in Yakkala and Warakapola.

{branches.map((branch, index) => (

{branch.name}

{branch.address}

Call WhatsApp Directions
))}
); }; export default Branches;
